creator: chess@chessgriffin.com
text:
Attached diff (tested on local tinderbox) updates multimedia/gpodder to current upstream release 0.10.3.

diff -u /usr/ports/multimedia/gpodder-old/Makefile /usr/ports/multimedia/gpodder/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/multimedia/gpodder-old/Makefile	2007-12-14 13:03:06.000000000 -0500
+++ /usr/ports/multimedia/gpodder/Makefile	2007-12-15 08:52:11.000000000 -0500
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	gpodder
-PORTVERSION=	0.10.1
+PORTVERSION=	0.10.3
 CATEGORIES=	multimedia
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_BERLIOS}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	gpodder
@@ -31,7 +31,7 @@
 MANCOMPRESSED=	no
 MAN1=		${PORTNAME}.1
 
-PORTDOCS=	AUTHORS COPYING ChangeLog PKG-INFO README TODO
+PORTDOCS=	AUTHORS COPYING ChangeLog PKG-INFO README
 
 OPTIONS=	IPOD "iPod synchronization support" off \
 		VIDEO "Video media support using mplayer" off \
diff -u /usr/ports/multimedia/gpodder-old/distinfo /usr/ports/multimedia/gpodder/distinfo
--- /usr/ports/multimedia/gpodder-old/distinfo	2007-12-14 13:03:06.000000000 -0500
+++ /usr/ports/multimedia/gpodder/distinfo	2007-12-14 21:17:08.000000000 -0500
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (gpodder-0.10.1.tar.gz) = 39e07f2641abb2ec3e19cbf0d34d3087
-SHA256 (gpodder-0.10.1.tar.gz) = 0471215aadeb3b188df5f836bb88e9d95371054615632991dc91317974220193
-SIZE (gpodder-0.10.1.tar.gz) = 186559
+MD5 (gpodder-0.10.3.tar.gz) = 3dd69b83b3f9100533052eddeac220d9
+SHA256 (gpodder-0.10.3.tar.gz) = d69b2d3b17b40169cb6947dc2b6a8ad4ade72b30be777b8c719359650e225f34
+SIZE (gpodder-0.10.3.tar.gz) = 221747
diff -u /usr/ports/multimedia/gpodder-old/pkg-plist /usr/ports/multimedia/gpodder/pkg-plist
--- /usr/ports/multimedia/gpodder-old/pkg-plist	2007-12-14 13:03:06.000000000 -0500
+++ /usr/ports/multimedia/gpodder/pkg-plist	2007-12-15 15:26:58.000000000 -0500
@@ -1,15 +1,19 @@
 bin/gpodder
-%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/gpodder-0.10.1-py2.5.egg-info
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/gpodder-0.10.3-py2.5.egg-info
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/gpodder/SimpleGladeApp.py
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/gpodder/SimpleGladeApp.pyc
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/gpodder/__init__.py
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/gpodder/__init__.pyc
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/gpodder/cache.py
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/gpodder/cache.pyc
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/gpodder/config.py
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/gpodder/config.pyc
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/gpodder/console.py
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/gpodder/console.pyc
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/gpodder/download.py
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/gpodder/download.pyc
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/gpodder/draw.py
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/gpodder/draw.pyc
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/gpodder/gui.py
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/gpodder/gui.pyc
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/gpodder/libconverter.py
@@ -42,6 +46,7 @@
 %%NLS%%share/locale/de/LC_MESSAGES/gpodder.mo
 %%NLS%%share/locale/es/LC_MESSAGES/gpodder.mo
 %%NLS%%share/locale/fr/LC_MESSAGES/gpodder.mo
+%%NLS%%share/locale/gl/LC_MESSAGES/gpodder.mo
 %%NLS%%share/locale/it/LC_MESSAGES/gpodder.mo
 %%NLS%%share/locale/nl/LC_MESSAGES/gpodder.mo
 %%NLS%%share/locale/pt/LC_MESSAGES/gpodder.mo
